rule: Parse duration strings with Go standard library time.ParseDuration before applying policy checks
Accept Go duration syntax such as 300ms 1.5h and 2h45m
Reject ISO8601 duration syntax such as P1DT2H
Parse the bound with time.ParseDuration and require input duration to be greater than or equal to it
Parse the bound with time.ParseDuration and require input duration to be less than or equal to it
By default reject negative durations; permit them only when this flag is present
